titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/153

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=427 status=live modified=2021-04-06 15:16:00.11029+00 | translation moa=428 status=live modified=2021-04-06 15:16:01.555211+00

div.p:
Omnibus Sancte Matris ecclesie filiis Patricius de Ridale Salutem . Sciant presentes et posteri me concessisse et hac mea
carta confirmasse deo et ecclesie Sancte Marie de Meylros et Monachis ibidem deo seruientibus pro anima mea et animabus
omnium antecessorum et successorum meorum donationem Roberti de Bernoldebi de uiginti acris terre scilicet Rauenesfen quam
fecit predicte ecclesie in liberam elemosinam de illis duabus carrucatis terre quas ipse Robertus et heredes sui tenent de me
et heredibus meis in territorio de Wittun que date ei fuerunt pro seruicio suo in feudo et hereditate . Quare uolo
ut predicti monachi predictas . uiginti . acras teneant et possideant per easdem diuisas que continentur in carta ipsius
Roberti quam habent monachi de easdem terra cum omnibus libertatibus et pertinenciis suis ita libere quiete plenarie
et honorifice sicut carta ipsius Roberti testatur et confirmat . et sicut . aliquam aliam elemosinam liberius et quiecius
tenent et possident . Saluo seruicio meo quod mihi et heredibus meis ipse Robertus et heredes sui pro eadem terra facient . His Testibus . scilicet domino . I . Glasguensi Episcopo . Ernaldo abbate Rieuallensi . Symone glasguensi archidiacono . Iohanne de hunted’
Willelmo filio iohannis . Rogero de Berkelei . Ricardo naim . Henrico de molle . adam de chathou . Radulfo Ridale . Adam
. . . Alexandro filio Walleui de lillesclif . et aliis multis .

p.cl: To all sons of Holy Mother Church, Patrick of Ryedale sends greeting.

Let present and future know me to have licensed and by this my charter made firm to God and to the church of St Mary at Melrose and to the monks serving God in that place for my soul and the souls of all my ancestors and successors the donation of Robert of Barnoldby in respect of twenty acres of land, namely ‘Raven’s Fen’, which he made to the said church in free alms from the two ploughgates of land that Robert himself and his heirs hold of me and my heirs in the territory of Whitton which were given to him in return for his service in feu and heritage. Wherefore I will that the said monks should hold and possess the said twenty acres by the same boundaries which are contained in Robert’s own charter which the monks have concerning the same land, with all its liberties and pertinents, as freely, quitely, fully and honourably as Robert’s own charter bears witness and affirms, and just as they freely and quitely hold and possess any other alms. Saving my service which Robert himself and his heirs shall do for me and my heirs in return for the same land.
